commits.subject: Day 109 (20:24): Improve task verification gate to capture diff evidence for reverted-no-edit tasks (Task 2)

eval.reason: The implementation adds git_diff_summary() helper (staged/unstaged/untracked), includes it in verify() output, preserves existing ok/reason logic, adds a self-test for diff_summary population, and all self-tests pass via --test.
